/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/VevingHjelper.dir/src/app.cpp.o CMakeFiles/VevingHjelper.dir/src/config.cpp.o CMakeFiles/VevingHjelper.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/VevingHjelper.dir/src/ui.cpp.o -o VevingHjelper  external/raylib/raylib/libraylib.a -framework Cocoa -framework IOKit -framework CoreVideo -framework OpenGL -framework Cocoa -framework IOKit -framework CoreFoundation
